content: Patch M20.5: unify silent batch path with interactive analyzeCard+saveAll
Replace bgBatch state with simpler bulkInfo {totalFiles, skippedDuplicates}; derive progress via useMemo from cards
Modify handleFiles: always continueInteractive; when files>threshold set bulkInfo + auto-call saveAll via saveAllRef
Simplify DuplicateConfirmDialog handlers (drop pendingBatchSave branch, ~70 LoC)
Stamp analyzeError on failed analyzeCard for the derived bgBatch.analyzeFailed counter
Lint + build clean; file shrank from 2370→2086 lines (-12%)
